### What this PR does
Adds outreach materials and a release draft for Pillar‑45 (GF(3) QEC + MLUT).

### Files added
- `outreach/press_release.md`
- `outreach/blog_post.md`
- `outreach/social_posts.md`
- `outreach/press_kit.md`
- `outreach/README.md`
- `outreach/announce_checklist.md`
- `RELEASES/DRAFT_v2026-02-15-qec-mlut.md`
- `RELEASES/README.md`

### How to review
- Review wording in `outreach/*` and the release draft.
- After merge: create a GitHub Release using tag `v2026-02-15-qec-mlut` and follow the announce checklist.
